    C

    clearWorld() - Static method in class Entity
     
    Commander - Class in Unnamed Package
    Commanders are apex predators who hunt other entities to maintain the station's population balance.
    Commander() - Constructor for class Commander
     

    D

    displayWorld() - Static method in class Entity
     
    doTimeStep() - Method in class Commander
    Commanders walk and run randomly every 6 timesteps.
    doTimeStep() - Method in class Engineer
    Engineers move in a systematic row pattern and reproduce at 150 energy.
    doTimeStep() - Method in class Entity
    Entity specfic time step
    doTimeStep() - Method in class MaintenanceBot
    doTimestep reproduces a MaintenanceBot when energy is above 150, randomly subtracts a gene, randonly adds a gene, and updates the direction based on gene distribution.
    doTimeStep() - Method in class PowerCell
    PowerCell's doTimestep increases the energy that can be consumed by 1

    E

    Engineer - Class in Unnamed Package
    Engineers are efficient farmers who tend to the station's resources.
    Engineer() - Constructor for class Engineer
     
    Entity - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Entity() - Constructor for class Entity
     

    F

    fight(String) - Method in class Commander
    Commanders always fight.
    fight(String) - Method in class Engineer
    Engineers eat powercells for energy and fight other engineers for population control.
    fight(String) - Method in class Entity
    return true or false depending on fight behavior
    fight(String) - Method in class MaintenanceBot
    Always returns true as maintenanceBots always fight.
    fight(String) - Method in class PowerCell
    PowerCell's fight method returns false, as it is always consumed upon conflict

    G

    getEnergy() - Method in class Entity
     
    getGenes() - Method in class MaintenanceBot
     
    getInstances(String) - Static method in class Entity
    The getinstances class retrieves all the instances/entites of a give type in the population
    getRandomInt(int) - Static method in class Entity
     

    I

    InvalidEntityException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
    Exception thrown when trying to create an invalid entity type.
    InvalidEntityException(String) - Constructor for exception class InvalidEntityException
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
     
    Main - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Main() - Constructor for class Main
     
    MaintenanceBot - Class in Unnamed Package
    MaintenanceBot — an autonomous robot that evolves its movement over time.
    MaintenanceBot() - Constructor for class MaintenanceBot
     
    makeEntity(String) - Static method in class Entity
    MakeEntity creates a new entity of the given class name using reflection.
    min_reproduce_energy - Static variable in class Params
     

    P

    Params - Class in Unnamed Package
     
    Params() - Constructor for class Params
     
    PowerCell - Class in Unnamed Package
    PowerCell — the basic energy source for the space station.
    PowerCell() - Constructor for class PowerCell
     

    R

    refresh_powercell_count - Static variable in class Params
     
    reproduce(Entity, int) - Static method in class Entity
    Reproduce takes in a parent entity and creates a baby/offspring entity Divides the energy with the baby and places the baby adjacent to the parent depending on input direction.
    rest_energy_cost - Static variable in class Params
     
    run(int) - Method in class Entity
     
    run_energy_cost - Static variable in class Params
     
    runStats(String) - Static method in class Entity
    Prints a summary of the given entity type.
    runStats(List) - Static method in class Commander
    Print statistics for Commander entities.
    runStats(List) - Static method in class Engineer
    Print statistics for Engineer entities.
    runStats(List) - Static method in class MaintenanceBot
    Prints the count, and also the gene distribution of all maintenaceBots.
    runStats(List) - Static method in class PowerCell
    Print statistics for PowerCell entities.

    S

    setEnergy(int) - Method in class Entity
     
    setSeed(long) - Static method in class Entity
     
    solar_energy_amount - Static variable in class Params
     
    start_energy - Static variable in class Params
     

    T

    toString() - Method in class Commander
    Display character is 'C' for Commander.
    toString() - Method in class Engineer
    Display character is 'E' for Engineer.
    toString() - Method in class Entity
    Returns display character
    toString() - Method in class MaintenanceBot
    Display character is 'M' for MaintenanceBot.
    toString() - Method in class PowerCell
    PowerCell's toString returns its display Character '*'

    world_width - Static variable in class Params

    Advances the simulation by one time step.
